race.comment: Decimated by scratchings as always with the small capacity. AMORE SIRENA (7) comes out on top and looks hard to beat. Has been thereabouts and although this is a shade tougher company she placed only try course and distance and with some key rivals spotting a start will take catching. EMBOLDEN (10) is a lightly raced filly who has recorded her best figures here including the maiden win. Drawn well and will be winding up late. CRYPTIC SOUND (5) returns from a break and is a fresh-up winner. Another who will be winding up late. FROTHSAY (6) was a winner here two back then safely held on the heavy ground on the Sunshine Coast last time. Could well bounce back. HERECOMESANTORINI (4) rates highly and can give a sight at odds.
